PLAS-45 Epoch

From Helldivers Wiki

Source
Control Group P1
“

A powerful plasma weapon that fires one blast at a time, each blast exploding on impact. Must be charged to fire. Warning: do not overcharge.

— Ship Management Terminal

The PLAS-45 Epoch is an energy-based plasma Support Weapon Stratagem with  Heavy armor penetration that scales armor penetration and damage.

Contents

  • 1 Procurement
  • 2 Stratagem Statistics
  • 3 Detailed Weapon Statistics
  • 4 Functionality
  • 5 Tactical Information
  • 6 Applicable Ship Modules
  • 7 Media
  • 8 Trivia
  • 9 Change History
  • 10 References

Procurement

The PLAS-45 Epoch is unlocked on the 1st page of the Control Group Premium Warbond for 75 Medals.

Stratagem Statistics

General
Call-in Time Standard 7.75 seconds
Upgraded 4.75 seconds
Uses Unlimited
Cooldown Standard 480 seconds
With Morale Augmentation 456 seconds

Functionality

The Epoch holds 4 magazines by default, each containing 3 shots, which must be reloaded while stationary. In turn, it has  Heavy to  Anti-Tank I armor penetration and high explosion damage centered in a small area. Like the RS-422 Railgun, the Epoch must be charged before it can fire, risking the death of the user and destruction of the weapon if that charge is held for too long. The armor penetration only scales up to  Anti-Tank I armor penetration when overcharged; this state additionally grants the weapon +100% bonus projectile and +60% explosion damage.

  • The following are recognizable indicators to know the fully charged state of the weapon:
    • The charge meter that can be seen either under the sight in first-person or at the back of the gun in third-person. This meter enters the red zone when the gun is overcharged.
    • The muzzle flash that occurs only when the weapon reaches its overcharged state.
    • The rapid beeping noises that also occur to indicate to the Helldiver that the weapon is ready to fire.
    • The pins visible on the barrel of the weapon will retract into the barrel

Firing the fully-charged plasma bolt will also result in a visually larger explosion with a more powerful sound effect.

Tactical Information

  • The explosion of the Epoch's overcharged projectile is largely cosmetic, as the actual damage radius is substantially smaller and is only marginally larger than the SG-8P Punisher Plasma or PLAS-101 Purifier.
    • As such, while the Epoch is capable of easily killing dense groups of Heavy Devastators or Alpha Commanders, the weapon's limited ammo, charge time, and relatively small blast radius makes it less than ideal for large crowds or spread out enemies.
  • The projectile the Epoch fires has a 0.6 second lifetime, meaning that it only has an approximate maximum range of 150m.
  • Unlike similar support weapons like the GR-8 Recoilless Rifle or the LAS-99 Quasar Cannon, the Epoch is severely impacted by enemy part durability and Explosive Damage Resistance.
    • The Epoch's projectile does half as much durable damage as it does standard damage, meaning that the Epoch can lose up to a quarter of its damage when shooting at an enemy body part that is 100% durable.
    • Half of the Epoch's total damage is contained within its explosion, which means that enemies with high ExDR values like the Harvester will receive significantly less damage than they otherwise would.
      • Conversely, enemies with body parts vulnerable to explosion damage will receive far more damage, as all of their parts caught in the blast will receive damage.
  • The Epoch has a 2-stage reload; ejecting the canister and loading a new one. One can animation cancel the reload the moment the HUD magazine shows as white/loaded.
    • In situations where you cannot afford to sit and fully reload your Epoch, a good method is to "reload" by first ejecting the canister, remove the threat at hand, then reload the Epoch somewhere safe.
  • The Epoch's uncharged plasma bolts only have a demolition force of 10. This demolition force increases to 30 when fully-charged, making it capable of destroying structures like Bug Holes, the vents of Automaton Fabricators, or Cargo Containers.
  • Pairing the Epoch with a B-1 Supply Pack can help to mitigate the extremely poor ammo economy of this weapon.
    • Using the Siege-Ready armor perk grants an additional spare magazine, slightly alleviating its limited ammo economy.
  • Due to the long charge-up time, pairing the Epoch with mobility-related backpacks like the LIFT-850 Jump Pack or shield packs like the SH-32 Shield Generator Pack may help you charge the weapon without being staggered.
    • Notably, when used with the LIFT-850 Jump Pack, the Epoch can begin reloading while the Helldiver is still in the air.
  • Like the MLS-4X Commando, the Epoch often takes two or more shots to kill heavy enemies if care is not taken to hit their weakpoints.
  • The Epoch's explosion damage allows it to exploit enemies whose body parts are not fully explosion-immune, like those of Dragonroaches and Chargers. By aiming at the center of Dragonroaches or at the upper-back of Chargers, enough body parts can be hit by the explosion to either outright kill the enemy or send them into bleedout[1].

Applicable Ship Modules

The following Ship Modules affect the PLAS-45 Epoch:

Department Ship Module Effect
Patriotic
Administration
Center 		Donation Access License Support Weapons deploy with the maximum number of carriable magazines.
Streamlined Request Process Decreases Support Weapon stratagem cooldown by 10%.
Superior Packing Methodology Resupply stratagem boxes refill Support Weapons with the maximum number of carriable magazines.
Payroll Management System Reduce reload time for all support weapons by 10%.
Bridge Morale Augmentation Reduces cooldown time for all Stratagems by 5%.
Engineering
Bay 		Streamlined Launch Process All Support Weapon stratagems launch immediately once called in, reducing overall deployment time.

Media

  • Tutorial Video Demonstrating Use of the PLAS-45 Epoch
  • Weapon Wheel for the PLAS-45 Epoch.
  • Third-Person on the PLAS-45 Epoch.
  • First-Person on the PLAS-45 Epoch

Trivia

  • In the Devlog for the patch 4.1.0 it was stated that the base demolition force of the Epoch would be buffed to 20 from 10 , however this change is not in game , only the overcharged state got its demolition force buffed .

Change History

Patch
Description

1.005.000
2025-12-02

Change

  • PLAS-45 Epoch now correctly zooms in ADS mode, just like any other support weapon

1.004.100
2025-10-23

Changes

  • Duration until explosion increased from 3 to 3.25 sec
  • Delayed muzzle charge VFX by 0.5 seconds so it now appears when the projectile is overcharged, improving visibility of the charge state
  • Uncharged Explosion damage increased from 400 to 500
  • Demolition strength on overcharged projectile increased from 10 to 30

Undocumented Fix

  • Fixed reload animation being out of sync if the Payroll Management System ship module was acquired

1.003.202
2025-08-05

Change

  • Spread reduced by 75%
    • Spread decreased from 150/100 to 30/30 mrads.

1.003.201
2025-07-17
(Mid-Patch)

Addition

  • Added to the game.

1.003.104
2025-07-10
(Mid-Patch)

Announced

References

  1. ↑
    Behemoth charger being sent into bleedout by shooting its upper back with an overcharged Epoch.
